root: ^The manager is a tired dude. He looks up when the party approaches from where he was playing on his phone.
^MANAGER: "Oh. Didn't expect anyone to be here. How can I help you?"
^The party has options blah blah blah, but they are all first time options.

dreamvisisted: ^The manager looks up, no longer surprised to see you.
^The party has even more options blah blah blah and the options they have are impacted by whatever they have interacted with in the real world.
